name: Automated Video Generator
description: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Supports YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and landscape formats.
author: Premkumar M (@itsPremkumar)

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a professional video from a text script with AI voiceovers and stock footage.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available AI voice options for TTS.

tools.name: list_local_assets
tools.description: List media files available in the local assets directory.
